calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-11-2025 Advanced From Sep-11-25 To Sep-11-25 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 514

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-11-2025 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Samuel Doomon Lee appeared.
Defendant Marvin Evans ET AL appeared.

Defendant Marvin Evans sworn and testified.
Plaintiff Samuel Doomon Lee sworn and testified.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

The Court DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE this action on procedural grounds. This Court is not passing judgement on the merits of the case. By way of analysis, the Court notes the following:

1.) Petitioner's action is for breach of contract, but no contract was filed with the Petition.
2.) The court is persuaded by Respondent that the claims brought in this action are part of a larger business dispute between the parties. The parties agree that there are two other actions pending between them - one in Alameda County and one in San Mateo County. From what the parties describe, the San Mateo matter is an unlimited action where Petitioner has sued Respondent for breach of the contract involving the sale of a business that gave rise to the specific project that is the subject of this Small Claims action. Responded has countersued Petitioner for, among other things, fraudulent inducement. Both parties are represented by counsel in the San Mateo matter. Accordingly, this Court finds that to prevent inconsistent verdicts, convenience of the parties, procedural fairness, and judicial economy, the present dispute should be addressed in the larger San Mateo action.

Judge: Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: A. Torres; Not reported. (514)
